title: synaedrys calathiformis
side_effects: Synaedrys calathiformis can have side effects if used improperly, such as severe allergic reactions, nausea, and dizziness. Ingesting the plant's extract can also lead to stomach ulcers and diarrhea, while long-term use may cause liver damage and kidney failure. Improper use of the plant's essential oil can result in skin irritation, respiratory problems, and headaches. Additionally, using the plant without proper medical guidance can worsen underlying health conditions, such as high blood pressure and cardiovascular disease.
